internal_thoughts:

parsed_output.justification: According to the post-game reveal, Jack started as the Werewolf. Hailey, acting as the Robber, swapped cards with Jack, becoming the Werewolf herself. Subsequently, Erin, acting as the Troublemaker, swapped the cards of Hailey and Brent, which transferred the Werewolf role to Brent. Therefore, Brent ended the game as the Werewolf.
